title: Erica puberuliflora
taxonomy: Erica puberuliflora is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to South Africa. As a member of the Erica genus, Erica puberuliflora is a type of heath or more specifically, a species of erica known as the heather. The classification of Erica puberuliflora places it within the family Ericaceae and the genus Erica. More specifically, it is classified as Erica puberuliflora, with no further classification available at this level.
